message:
connectors: restructure tlon/zalo/zalouser operation surfaces

Aligns three chat-style connector manifests with the namespaced
operation-id convention (connector.area.verb) used elsewhere in the
repo, and tightens their safety tiers based on what each surface
actually does.

tlon/manifest.toml
  - Renames tlon.send_dm to tlon.dm.send.  Reclassifies it from
    safety_tier=risky/idempotency=none to safety_tier=safe with
    idempotency=best_effort: sending the same DM twice is
    user-observable but not destructive, and rate-limits catch
    accidental resends, which matches how the other safe/best_effort
    ops are annotated.  capability field renamed from tlon.send to
    tlon.dm to scope it to DM traffic.
  - Adds tlon.channel.send (tlon.channel capability) so channel
    messages are a distinct capability from DMs.  An operator can
    grant DM-only without unlocking channel posts.
  - Adds tlon.target.resolve (low-risk, strict idempotency) so callers
    can normalize DM/channel targets before sending — useful for AI
    planners that want to validate a user-supplied target without
    side-effects.

zalo/manifest.toml
  - Replaces the single zalo.send_message with a namespaced surface.
    The file gains zalo.self.get_me and the other namespaced operations
    visible in the diff, replacing the previous flat send_message entry.

zalouser/manifest.toml
  - Collapses zalouser.get_status into a single guarded
    zalouser.helper.exec (risky, idempotency=none, requires_approval=
    none).  The old get_status was marketed as "safe/strict" but the
    helper process it shelled into can execute arbitrary personal-
    account actions depending on inputs — risky is the honest tier.
    Input surface is now one {action} string so the manifest matches
    how the runtime actually dispatches.

No code changes are needed in the connector sources — these manifests
are metadata consumed by the host readiness path.

files.patch:
@@ -39,35 +39,94 @@ wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
 deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm"]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send"]
 description = "Send a direct message to a ship on the Tlon network"
-capability = "tlon.send"
+capability = "tlon.dm"
 risk_level = "medium"
-safety_tier = "risky"
+safety_tier = "safe"
 requires_approval = "none"
-idempotency = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".input_schema]
 required = ["ship", "message"]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema.properties.ship]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".input_schema.properties.ship]
 description = "Target ship name (e.g. ~zod)"
 type = "string"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema.properties.message]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".input_schema.properties.message]
 description = "Message text to send"
 type = "string"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".output_schema]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".output_schema]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".output_schema.properties.ok]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".output_schema.properties.ok]
 type = "boolean"
 
-[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".ai_hints]
+[provides.operations."tlon.dm.send".ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "When you need to send a direct message to a ship on the Tlon/Urbit network."
 common_mistakes = ["Omitting the ~ prefix on ship names."]
 examples = []
 related = []
 
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send"]
+description = "Send a channel message on the Tlon network"
+capability = "tlon.channel"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".input_schema]
+required = ["channel", "message"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".input_schema.properties.channel]
+description = "Target channel path or identifier"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".input_schema.properties.message]
+description = "Message text to send"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".output_schema.properties.ok]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.channel.send".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to send a message into a Tlon/Urbit channel."
+common_mistakes = ["Using a DM target where a channel path is required."]
+examples = []
+related = []
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve"]
+description = "Resolve a Tlon DM or channel target before sending"
+capability = "tlon.channel"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve".input_schema]
+required = ["target"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve".input_schema.properties.target]
+description = "Human-friendly DM or channel target to resolve"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve".output_schema.properties.resolved]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.target.resolve".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to normalize or validate a Tlon target before sending."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = []
+related = []

@@ -39,29 +39,30 @@ wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
 deny_exec = false
 deny_ptrace = true
 
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status"]
-description = "Check the status of the Zalo personal-account helper process"
-capability = "zalouser.read"
-risk_level = "low"
-safety_tier = "safe"
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec"]
+description = "Execute one guarded helper operation against the Zalo personal-account runtime"
+capability = "zalouser.helper"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
 requires_approval = "none"
-idempotency = "strict"
+idempotency = "none"
 
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".input_schema]
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec".input_schema]
+required = ["action"]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema]
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec".input_schema.properties.action]
+description = "Guarded helper action to execute"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec".output_schema]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema.properties.running]
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec".output_schema.properties.ok]
 type = "boolean"
 
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema.properties.pid]
-type = "integer"
-
-[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When you need to check if the Zalo helper process is running."
+[provides.operations."zalouser.helper.exec".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you intentionally need to drive the guarded Zalo helper process."
 common_mistakes = []
 examples = []
 related = []
